activeGoal: 修复 sidepanel 中主 AGENT 选择器点击后列表不可见的问题，将其从 composer 内部绝对定位下拉改为类似 drawer 的独立浮层容器，确保不受 overflow 裁切且点击可见可选。

tasks.title: 修复 sidepanel 中主 AGENT 选择器点击后列表不可见的问题，将其从 composer 内部绝对定位下拉改为类似 drawer 的独立浮层容器，确保不受 overflow 裁切且点击可见可选。
tasks.summary: Fast-track sidepanel main agent menu fix completed. Replaced composer-local clipped dropdown with overlay-hosted floating menu, preserved the two allowed agent options, added focused interaction coverage, and validated with sidepanel App tests plus extension typecheck.
